content: Curiosity-driven intrinsic reward methods (ICM, RND) can be repurposed to dynamically reward coding agents for exploring untested edge cases and under-explored code architectures, rather than just rewarding them for completing the specified coding task. This creates self-improving coding agents that spontaneously discover more robust, generalizable solutions without human-specified reward signals for debugging or edge-case testing.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
trigger_topic: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
